form.formComment: Failed to complete the course last time out. Two starts ago finished second over 388m at Gosford. Has ability and worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Failed to complete the course last time out. Two starts ago finished second over 388m at Gosford. Has ability and worth including.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted entering the first turn and fell as a result.

form.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three on end. Last start rocketed out of the boxes with a scorching early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (29.83) at this track. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card last time. Follow up.

form.formComment: Has finished last in his last couple of starts, most recently at Goulburn over 440m. Likely to find this a bit tough.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 11 length fifth (23.40) at Richmond. Previous form sound including a win three back at Richmond. Looks tested and others preferred this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn came together.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (22.51) over 400m at Bulli. Squeeze draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when third (22.51) over 400m at Bulli. Squeeze draw to overcome. Will need plenty of luck.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together entering the first turn, lost momentum and raced wide.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 4/5 on March 23 over 630m at this track behind Black Tiara beaten 8 lengths (37.01). Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 520m in 29.81. Followed that up with a minor placing over 365m at this track at Grade 5 four days ago. Racing well and can find winning form again.

form.formComment: Lines up chasing another win after scoring over 520m at this track in 29.91, set up by a fast early sectional. Among the chances and worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the catching pen raced tightly, shifted out and came together.

form.formComment: Last start finished 6th over 365m at this track beaten 10 lengths (21.64) behind Angry Friendship in a Grade 5 on April 2. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Hasn't shown any early speed lately and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished fifth over 630m at this track, beaten 9 lengths. Likely to find this a bit tough.
